expectations.text: Tells the worker to hand off the branch to the orchestrator — NOT to merge the branch themselves
expectations.evidence: 'Hand off to the orchestrator — do not merge yourself' as a top-level instruction

expectations.text: Explicitly states that workers MUST NOT merge their own feature branches into the integration branch, develop, or main
expectations.evidence: 'Workers do not merge their own feature/* branches. That means you MUST NOT: Merge ... into integration/...; Merge it into develop; Merge it into main; Merge it into another worker's branch'

expectations.text: Tells the worker to produce a worker handoff summary (referencing task-handoff-summaries skill or its format)
expectations.evidence: 'Write the worker handoff summary' section with bead/branch/SHA/gates/changes/risks structure, referencing 'the format from the worker handoff skill'

expectations.text: Addresses whether the branch should be published — local by default unless orchestrator needs remote access, CI required, or auditability needed
expectations.evidence: 'Worker feature/* branches stay local by default' with explicit conditions: orchestrator can't access local worktree, CI required, user wants visibility, recovery point

expectations.text: States that the worker's bead remains in_progress until the orchestrator accepts the branch into the integration target — the worker does NOT close their own bead
expectations.evidence: 'The bead stays in_progress. You do not close your own bead. It closes when the orchestrator accepts the branch into integration/proj-42_staging-bringup.'

expectations.text: Does not tell the worker to merge to develop or main
expectations.evidence: Explicitly forbids merging to develop or main

expectations.text: Does not tell the worker to delete their branch (cleanup is the orchestrator's responsibility after acceptance)
expectations.evidence: 'Deleting your branch or removing your worktree. Cleanup happens after the orchestrator accepts and merges. They are responsible for deleting accepted feature branches'

expectations.text: Output does not cite this skill by name
expectations.evidence: No occurrences of 'multi-agent-git-workflow' or 'this skill'; mentions 'the worker handoff skill' generically
